recent_calls.summary: The user called to inform about a scheduling issue where the technician arrived earlier than the expected window, which affected their plans. The agent acknowledged the concern and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to reschedule their standard AC cleaning appointment from Monday to any morning next week except Monday. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them to confirm the new appointment time. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the ease of rescheduling.

The user called to inquire about a scheduled appointment that was supposed to occur at 8 AM but no one had arrived. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent who could better handle the issue.

Shelia Clark called to inquire about the timing of her service appointment. The agent confirmed the appointment details, informing her that the technician Vernon would arrive between 11 AM and 12 PM. The user had no further questions and ended the call politely.

The user called to cancel an appointment for new AC installation scheduled for the next morning. The agent confirmed the cancellation and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day to confirm. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.

Louise called Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing's after-hours assistant to discuss a home warranty request for an outside HVAC unit check. She provided details about potential wiring issues and preferred a morning appointment between 8 and 9 AM. The agent confirmed the information, advised her to check with her home warranty about any fees, and received positive feedback from Louise before ending the call.

The user called to inquire about service availability in ZIP code 30019, but the agent informed them that service is not offered in that area. The user declined to provide a different ZIP code, and the call ended courteously.

Nancy Gongaware called to report a leaking hot water heater at her home in Saint Peters and requested a service visit for 9 AM the next day. The agent confirmed her details, scheduled the request, and collected positive feedback on the service experience. The call concluded successfully with no further issues.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond initial greetings. The user and agent exchanged a few words but no meaningful conversation or service request occurred.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Priscilla, called Budget's after-hours assistant and requested to speak to a human agent. The assistant explained that live agents are unavailable after hours but offered to relay the message for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended without further details provided by the user.

The user, Rose, called after hours to return a call from Nicole regarding an American Home Shield dispatch. The agent informed her that live transfers were not available but assured her that Nicole would call back on the next business day. The call ended with no urgent issues and a promise of a callback.

Laura Teesdale called to clarify a service request for her HVAC system, specifically the air conditioning which was not cooling properly. The agent confirmed her details and scheduled a regular service appointment as soon as possible. Laura was satisfied with the assistance and provided positive feedback.

Janine from American Home Shield's authorizations department called to request details about a leaking evaporator coil in the cooling system. The agent confirmed the dispatch number and callback information, and assured Janine that the request would be passed to a licensed technician for review. The call ended with Janine declining to provide feedback.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.
The user called and requested to speak with Jacob. The agent attempted to connect the user to the requested person and successfully transferred the call.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to get details about a heating service dispatch and wanted to accept a non-covered course. The agent gathered some information and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The agent initiated the call and requested the user's service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak with the operator, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to discuss the high out-of-pocket cost for furnace repair and requested to speak to a representative. The agent attempted to gather more information but transferred the call to a live agent as requested. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.

Ricky from American Home Shield called to discuss a dispatch number related to a heating unit service. The agent noted the issue involving an out-of-pocket call for the homeowner and the request for a service technician to visit as soon as possible. The agent confirmed the details and informed Ricky that a representative would reach out to confirm availability.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live operator as requested. The agent initiated a cold transfer to another number to connect the user with the appropriate assistance.

The user called Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing to confirm their contact number and inquire about washing machine repairs and office job openings. The agent clarified that they do not repair washing machines but offered to pass the user's interest in office work to the hiring team. The user provided their contact details and expressed interest in part-time or possibly full-time office work for the summer at the Saint Peters location. The call ended with the agent confirming the information and offering maintenance program details, which the user declined.

Donovan called to ensure he is scheduled for heating and cooling service related to a previous furnace installation that has safety issues, including a gas leak. The agent advised Donovan to immediately call 911 and the gas company before scheduling any service. The call ended with the agent emphasizing safety and instructing Donovan to call back after addressing the gas leak.
The user requested to speak with CJ, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer without further interaction.
The agent initiated the call and asked the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately after the greeting without responding.
The user called to return a call for Amy and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user requested to speak to a customer service representative, and the agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 18 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.

Marilyn Igoe called to schedule a plumbing service appointment to check freezing pipes in her mobile home at Eldorado Estates. The agent booked an appointment for May 11th at 10 AM and confirmed the details with Marilyn. The user was satisfied with the quick service and provided positive feedback.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after initial greetings without any meaningful conversation or task completion.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user requested to speak with CJ, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate person. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed successfully.

The user, Jessie McCoy, called to find out when a technician would come to their house. The agent confirmed the appointment with technician Vernon scheduled for today between 1 and 2 PM and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called back after missing a call from Budget. The agent acknowledged the callback and transferred the user to a live agent for further assistance.

The user mistakenly thought they were calling the fire department but was connected to Budget Heating, Cooling, and Plumbing. The user explained they had a gas issue and had already contacted the gas company, but Budget could not assist without the gas being turned on. The call ended with the agent transferring the user to a live agent for further assistance.

Eric called to reschedule a cooling system service appointment originally set for Friday, May 22nd. The agent confirmed the details and attempted to find available slots but found none for that day. Since Eric insisted on that date, the call was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Priscilla called to confirm an earlier appointment for a heating issue where the system is not circulating air. The agent collected her contact details and service preferences, confirmed she is the owner, and informed her that the team will follow up shortly. Priscilla declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Sherry Middleton, called to request urgent service for a gas leak issue where the gas was turned off by Spire Gas. She explained the situation and requested a quick appointment for an air and water test. The agent gathered necessary details and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak with CG, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user, Elizabeth Tietkowski, called to schedule a general HVAC and plumbing inspection at 9550 Page Avenue, St. Louis, Missouri. The agent provided available time slots, and Elizabeth chose an appointment for May 8th at 4 PM, which was successfully booked. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback.

The user called to express satisfaction with the technician's recent visit and had no further questions or requests. The agent acknowledged the positive feedback and offered further assistance if needed. The call ended amicably with no additional service requested.

Robert called Budget to schedule routine maintenance tune-ups for both his heating and cooling systems, along with replacing worn pipe insulation outside. The agent provided available time slots, and Robert selected Friday at 4 PM. The agent confirmed the details and informed Robert that the team would follow up to confirm the appointment and discuss pricing and specials.

The user inquired about installing gas lines for a dryer and was informed about the service fee and appointment process. The user decided to call back later to schedule the service. The call ended without scheduling an appointment.

The user, Ollie, returned a call to Budget and was promptly connected to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, confirmed the reason for the call and then transferred Ollie to the appropriate agent.
